title: Guardsman Wood Ring and Water Mark Remover Cloth - 1 Pack - Clean & Remove Marks from Wooden Surface | Removes Marks Caused by Liquid, Moisture and Heat from Wooden Furniture, Surfaces & Flooring
features: Unsightly blemishes can spoil the appearance of your wooden furniture. Removes ring marks on wood caused by water, alcohol, or heat and leaves your wood with an attractive sheen. Can also be used for polishing metal and chrome. The Guardsman Ring & Mark Remover Cloth is not suitable for use on oil-finished and unsealed woods.
Also conceals surface scratches, and removes latex paint, most permanent marker stains, and other minor blemishes from wood. Restores beauty without stripping the finish.
Spot remover cloth is reusable, allowing you to keep it handy for whenever you might need to use it.
Note: This Product is Only Available for Residents of England, Scotland & Wales. We Cannot Ship This Item Overseas
Made from 100% cotton, the cloth is effective on marks up to two years old. Can be used again and again if stored in its resealable pouch.

The Guardsman Ring & Mark Remover Cloth is treated with a special formula which gives it a slight oiled/greasy feel and aroma to it; these are the natural oils impregnated in the cloth. It should not be "moist" when opened but should always be put back into its sealed packaging to prevent it drying out. “
description: Product Description Excellence in Furniture Since 1915 Guardsman has been delivering quality products and services for the protection, care, and repair of fine furnishings. Guardsman products include polishes and cleaners for fine wood, leather, and fabric furniture, as well as a complete line of furniture maintenance products for touch-up, repair and spot cleaning. For difficult jobs, Guardsman offers a complete line of professional repair services. Preserve the Life of Your Wooden Furniture Erase white rings and haze caused by moisture and heat Coffee stains, water droplets, and hazy spots on your favourite table are a thing of the past. With the Water Ring and Mark Remover from Guardsman, you can easily restore the original finish of your wooden furniture without costly repairs. Simply wipe the affected area with your reusable treated cloth and watch stains disappear. You may have to persevere as it can be more difficult to remove more stubborn marks. Removes marks on wood caused by water, alcohol, and heat Eliminates minor blemishes and surface scratches from wood Removes latex paint and most permanent marker stains Restores beauty without stripping finish Watch Wood Stains Disappear At work with ease! Recommended by furniture makers, with Guardsman Water Mark Remover, damage to your wood surfaces virtually vanishes before your eyes. Reusable cloth can be used time and again. Simply return the cloth to its packaging preserving its life and keeping it dry. As long as the cloth is not heavily soiled and stored correctly it should last for a long time. Removes Stains Caused By: Wine Water Marks Surface Scratches Ballpoint Pen Ink Permanent Marker Nail Polish And Many More!
